description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was being driven in manual mode eastbound on Jackson street between Montgomery and Sansome Streets when contact 
was made with the left side mirror of a parked car. There was minor damage to the Zoox vehicle's sensor housing and passenger side mirror. 
There were no injuries and police were not called.
